aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and location-specific optimization.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews to the website and encourage Google reviews to build trust and improve local SEO.
Optimize meta titles and descriptions with location-specific keywords (e.g., 'AC Repair in Reseda, CA').
Create dedicated service pages for each location to improve local search visibility.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has some location references but lacks a clear Google Business Profile (GBP) strategy.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business does not appear to have an active GBP, which is crucial for local search visibility and customer engagement.
critical_issues: No active Google Business Profile found.
Lack of location-specific content and keywords.
No customer reviews or ratings on Google.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or missing Name, Address, Phone (NAP) citations across the web, which harms local SEO.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Claim and verify the business on major local directories (e.g., Yelp, Bing Places, Yellow Pages).
Regularly update NAP information to maintain accuracy.

schema_gaps: No LocalBusiness schema with detailed address and service area information.
No Review schema to highlight customer testimonials.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of local content and engagement signals.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers searching for HVAC services in specific areas.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement a blog with location-specific articles and service updates.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Leverage partnerships with local businesses and participate in community events to boost local authority and online presence.
